title: antidesma lanceolarium
intro: Antidesma lanceolarium, also known as the lanceolate milkberry, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the Philippines, Malaysia, and Indonesia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Antidesma lanceolarium include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are typically used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health issues.
